---
title: "Joela Quartey"
image: "joela.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/joela-quartey-a51880347"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/Joelanaa"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:joelaquartey18@email.com"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
I am an economics and politics student currently studying at the University of Essex. 
I hope to establish a career of being a diplomat or working in the United Nations. I love reading, taking part in an sports especially athletics, and taking care of my nieces.
